summary: The diff implements logo replacement in Layout.tsx and LoginPage.tsx using a custom image, with appropriate alt text and sizing. However, the image is referenced via a raw upload path (/assets/file_0000000068a87208913cc2e62995fbaa.png) rather than the required canonical path (/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png), and there is no evidence that the image was saved as frontend/public/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png.

missing_requirements.requirement: The uploaded image must be saved as frontend/public/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png and referenced via that path in Layout.tsx and LoginPage.tsx.
missing_requirements.reason: Both Layout.tsx and LoginPage.tsx reference the image at /assets/file_0000000068a87208913cc2e62995fbaa.png instead of /assets/generated/studiora-logo.png. No new file was added under frontend/public/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png (ADDED FILES: none). The acceptance criterion requiring the canonical asset path is not met.
